steps.title: Find the shared debate
steps.content: Text 1 criticizes the word "curry" as colonial and inaccurate. Text 2 describes a chef who acknowledges that history but still uses the term for some dishes. Both texts focus on whether and how the term should be used.

steps.title: Reject narrower topics
steps.content: A appears only as an opening example in Text 1. B is not discussed in either text. C is broad background, not the point of view shared by both texts.

steps.title: Name the common topic
steps.content: Both texts present points of view about the use of the term "curry." The answer is D.
